message: Stage -1 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start status=completed
Stage 0 note refutes the nontrivial rank-one bridge-zonotope claim and gives the corrected sharp finite-LP proxy bound.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b (Stage 0.5 reject fast-path) — reviewer's novelty verdict is reject and explicitly states 'this is not a local revise-to-field situation': the locked kernel has collapsed to a generic Manski/Balke-Pearl finite-LP argument plus a negative refutation of the prior rank-one zonotope conjecture, which is subfield-tier and below the field novelty target. Correctness defect (Theta_I(P) vs Theta_LP(P) mismatch in thm:lp-sharp) is repairable, but even after repair the surviving positive content is generic LP sharpness, so a Stage 0 re-derivation on the same conjecture would burn budget without lifting tier.
Established shared-null PNDE/TNIE outer bound and sharpness iff primitive projection fills the bridge interval.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b — Stage 0.5 reject fast-path: the reviewer's grounds are conjecture-level (central Proposition thm:outer-sharp reduces to a definitional affine-image identity Theta_I(P)=f(E(P)) once E(P) is introduced; thm:total-effect is elementary affine algebra; the original Stage -1 sharpness conjecture is in fact refuted and replaced by a tautological object). This is not a localized derivation defect a Stage 0 re-derivation can fix — the kernel claim itself collapses to a definition, so re-deriving on the same .tex would burn budget. Pivot to a new angle (e.g. an observable full-fiber realisability criterion, a strictly tighter sharp proxy-mediation bound, or a nontrivial impossibility theorem) per Case 6b.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b — boundary stage_0.5_to_0 with reject on conjecture-level grounds. Reviewer documents that the Stage -1 sharpness claim E(P)=[ell,u] is explicitly refuted by the derivation, leaving only the tautological identity Theta_I(P)=f(E(P)) and an elementary two-point affine slope. This is not a derivation slip Stage 0 can repair; the conjecture itself has no field-tier kernel left. Per-boundary heuristic (counterexample-grade / inconsistent setup → user) is consistent with the pivot path — stage_neg1 is the propose-mode equivalent and the orchestrator will fall back to user if budget is exhausted.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b — boundary stage_0.5_to_0 reject is conjecture-level, not a derivation slip. The reviewer's novelty verdict shows the surviving claim after refuting the Stage -1 sharpness conjecture is a definitional projection identity (Theta_I(P)=f(E(P))) plus elementary affine-slope bookkeeping; thm:sharp-fails additionally lacks an explicit finite instance. No localized Stage 0 patch can lift this to field tier — the angle itself is unsalvageable as conjectured.
